title: Kyoto University Center for Interdisciplinary Studies of Law and Policy
content:
Description: 

Kyoto University Center for Interdisciplinary Studies of Law and Policy (KILAP) aims to pioneer interdisciplinary and international research through theory-practice collaboration to propose human-centered legal policy concepts that foster emerging academic fields and cultivate creative leaders for an inclusive, innovative society.

Home Page: 
Kyoto University Center for Interdisciplinary Studies of Law and Policy
Address: 
606-8501
K

title: Center for Digital Society (CfDS)
content:
Description: 

Center for Digital Society (CfDS) is a research center under the Faculty of Social and Political Sciences at Universitas Gadjah Mada. Our mission is to conduct research in the digital sphere to address socio-cultural challenges within digital society.

Home Page: 
Center for Digital Society
Address: 
Sosio Yustisia 1, Bulaksumur
Room BC202 Faculty of Social and Political Sciences Universitas Gadjah Mada Jl
